query: SELECT ce.id, ce.alunoId, ce.nomeCiclo, ce.dataInicio, ce.dataFim, a.name as alunoNome FROM ciclos_execucao ce JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ce.alunoId LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ce.id, ce.alunoId, ce.nomeCiclo, ce.dataInicio, ce.dataFim, a.name as alunoNome FROM ciclos_execucao ce JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ce.alunoId LIMIT 10;
